description: Main bookings table - stores all booking/order details including customer, venue, dates, and financial information

name: tblContact
description: Contact persons table - stores contact information for individuals

description: Customer/organization table - stores customer companies and organizations

description: Customer-contact link table - links contacts to customer organizations (many-to-many)

description: Products/inventory master table - master list of all products, packages, and equipment

description: Equipment transactions table - tracks all equipment items in bookings including quantities, rates, and dates

description: View showing product components - displays what items/components make up package products

description: Booking notes table - stores conversation transcripts and booking notes

sample_data.text_line:
Onsite Contacts: Sam Cui 0426 858 576

Last week Sam's junior assistant created the preso as a pdf with video's in the cloud and of course they had problems. At the time, he said he asked for a PPT and the stubborn junior made a pdf and of course their preso had images out of focus for 2 seconds as it downloaded.

Hopefully this week, it will be a PPT with all the video's sitting on his computer.

Special
Theatre for 48 Pax
3 X Cocktail Squares
4 X Blackclothed Trestle
Buffet station in Archive Room 2
-----------------------------------------------------------------
1 X Black clothed Trestle to be set up as Rego desk in front of the lift
3 X Cocktail Squares on foyer


13:30 PM -- Client Arrival / AV Rehearsal
14:00 PM -- Guests Arrival / High Tea to be set in Archive Room 2
14:15 PM -- Speech to commence
15:00 PM -- Guests leisure time
17:00 PM -- Event Conclude

Screen & Projector with Sound System for Background Music

Technician to connect the Clients Laptop to the projector
Technician to get good sound level & to show the client how to turn the volume up and down.

Labour - Minimum 3hr Call for a Weekend
